DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: David Barry, Esq. 398-6600 for pltf & opposing party; Bruce Isaacs, Esq. 310/358-3221 for defts & moving parties (appearing via Courtcall).
